    </a>

    <div class="label-artist-menu-links ui-menu-item">
        <span data-bind="visible: $root.artistsMenu.bmgr.bandByID(id) || $root.artistsMenu.lmgr.isMemberBandAuthed(id)">
            <a data-bind="
                attr: {href: 'https://bandcamp.com/profile?from=menubar&id=' + id}"
            >

            </a>
            <a data-bind="
                attr: {href: 'https://bandcamp.com/tools?from=menubar&id=' + id}"
            >
                <span class="menu-text">tools<span>
            </a>
            <!-- ko if: hasItems -->
                <a data-bind="click: $root.artistsMenu.launchPageDesign.bind($data)"><span class="menu-text">page design</span></a>
            <!-- /ko -->

            <!-- ko ifnot: hasService() -->
                <a data-bind="attr: { href: 'https://bandcamp.com/subscriptions?band_id=' + id + '&from=menubar'}"><span class="menu-text">subscription</span></a>
            <!-- /ko -->
            <!-- ko if: hasService() -->
                <a data-bind="attr: { href: trackpipeLocalUrl() + '/' + serviceUrlFragment() + '?from=menubar'}"><span data-bind="text: serviceName()" class="menu-text">subscription</span></a>
            <!-- /ko -->
        </span>
    </div>
    <!-- /ko -->
    <span class="show-less" data-bind="visible: $root.artistsMenu.activeLabelMemberBand() == id && ($root.artistsMenu.bmgr.bandByID(id) || $root.artistsMenu.lmgr.isMemberBandAuthed(id)), click: () => $root.artistsMenu.setActiveLabelMemberBand(id)">show less</span>
</script>

        <a class="name notSkinnable" href="https://bandcamp.com/onetr?from=fanthanks">onetr</a>
        A strong showing in minimalist classical in its own right, made even more interesting by the fact that this is Pharaoh Sanders' last appearance in music ever.<br><span class="lightweightBreak"></span><br>Side B kicks off with an incredible tear-jerker sequence, hence I put Mov. #6 as my favorite track! :)

        
            <span class="fav-track">Favorite track: Movement 6.</span>
        
    </div>

    <div class="writing">
    <a class="pic" href="https://bandcamp.com/ghuughra?from=fanthanks">
        
        <div class="tooltip">

        <img class="thumb" src="https://f4.bcbits.com/img/0042320168_42.jpg" alt="Ghuughra thumbnail"/>
        
    </a>
    <div class="text">
        
        <a class="name notSkinnable" href="https://bandcamp.com/ghuughra?from=fanthanks">Ghuughra</a>
        I know pundits like to throw around terms like 'breathtaking' and 'transcendent' with all the restraint of a toddler with a can of silly string, but d*mn if I can think of a more fitting set of adjectives. <br><span class="lightweightBreak"></span><br>Don't think I've ever heard anything quite like this. Pharaoh is the type of virtuoso that doesn't need to blow you out with tech to leave you speechless. Got me feeling emotions n sh*t.

        
            <span class="fav-track">Favorite track: Movement 7.</span>
        
    </div>
</div>

        <a class="name notSkinnable" href="https://bandcamp.com/luixcampox?from=fanthanks">luixcampox</a>
        Masterpiece! .. complex and subtle. Something holds everything togheter, stable, but also there is always change and movement. <br>
.<br>
Can't imagine how precise musicians must have been, and what a state of focus required to perform this whole sound trip. <br>
.<br>
Beautifull!
